title: JavaScript Functions Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential properties and tools for creating robust and cross-browser web experiences with functions and parameters.

questions.question: Which of these is the most modern and recommended way to build a professional-grade web application in JavaScript for reusable code?
options: Developing small, focused functions (like computeTotal()) that can be called many times.

questions.question: Which keyword is used to 'give back' a value from a function (e.g., return the result of a calculation)?
Which 'Pillar of the Web' is responsible for providing behavior and interactivity to a page (e.g., using functions to respond to events)?
What is 'Arrow Function' (like () => {}) inside a modern JavaScript application?
options: To make the site load much faster.
A cleaner, shorter syntax for defining functions that is highly popular in modern development.
To choose the colors for the animation.

questions.question: Which of these is a best practice for a professional-style stylesheet for JavaScript functions?
options: Commenting every single line of code.
Using as few parameters as possible.
Keeping functions small and focused on JUST one task (Single Responsibility).
Using variables for colors and spacing.
